title: What Karpathy Joining Anthropic Actually Means For Claude
summary: Nate Herk analyzes Andrej Karpathy's recent join at Anthropic, arguing that Karpathy's work on context engineering, LLM wikis, and goal-directed autonomous loops aligns with Claude Code's existing capabilities. The video predicts Anthropic will move toward context app stores and education layers for packaging workflows.
